teamObjective.explanation: Deterministically repaired ToM trace with objective finish_hand.

partnerBelief.summary: Partner (player 2, team 0) holds 3 cards and has not acted; no public signal exists. In this endgame-race opening lead, partner likely wants the team to exit cards quickly and preserve any high/trump cards for winning tricks or counters.

opponentBelief.summary: Opponents (players 1 and 3) each hold 3 cards and have revealed nothing. They will try to win tricks cheaply, retain trumps/bombs, and exploit any high card we waste. Leading low prevents them from immediately gaining tempo.

actionRationale.primaryReason: Leading the lowest card (A♠) best supports the team objective in this endgame race: it conserves the marginally stronger 2♠, minimizes the chance an opponent wins the trick with a just-above-minimum card, and follows standard opening-lead discipline of low-first when holding only small cards.

whyNotAlternatives.reason: Alternative mentioned in raw ToM output.

risks: Schema repair may preserve imperfect reasoning from the raw model output.
riskAssessment.mitigation: Treat the repaired trace as schema-normalized reasoning; do not add hidden-card facts beyond the raw output.

notes: Deterministically schema-repaired from a ToM-prompted raw output; selectedActionId is unchanged.
